# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.180.0/http/server.ts";

type FilterCriteria = Record<string, string | number | boolean>;
type KeyValue = [string, string | number | boolean, any];

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  age: number;
  isActive: boolean;
}

async function handleRequest(req: Request) {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;

  if (method === "GET" && path.startsWith("/users")) {
    return await searchUsers(url.searchParams);
  }

  if (method === "POST" && path === "/users") {
    return await createUser(req);
  }

  return new Response("Not Found", { status: 404 });
}

async function searchUsers(params: URLSearchParams) {
  const kv = await Deno.openKv();
  const filters: FilterCriteria = {};

  // Extract filter parameters
  for (const [key, value] of params.entries()) {
    if (key !== "page" && key !== "limit") {
      filters[key] = value;
    }
  }

  const results: User[] = [];
  const page = parseInt(params.get("page") || "1");
  const limit = parseInt(params.get("limit") || "10");
  const offset = (page - 1) * limit;

  // Build dynamic key based on filters
  const keyParts: (string | number)[] = ["users"];
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(filters)) {
    keyParts.push(key, value);
  }

  const prefix = keyParts as [string, ...Array<string | number>];
  
  // Iterate through matching keys
  const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix });
  const users: User[] = [];

  for await (const { key, value } of iter) {
    if (matchesFilters(value, filters)) {
      users.push(value);
    }
  }

  // Apply pagination
  const paginatedUsers = users.slice(offset, offset + limit);

  await kv.close();
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(paginatedUsers), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

function matchesFilters(user: User, filters: FilterCriteria): boolean {
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(filters)) {
    if (user[key as keyof User] !== value) {
      return false;
    }
  }
  return true;
}

async function createUser(req: Request) {
  const kv = await Deno.openKv();
  const userData = await req.json() as User;
  
  // Generate unique ID
  const userId = crypto.randomUUID();
  userData.id = userId;

  // Create key with user ID
  const key = ["users", userId] as [string, string];
  
  // Store user data
  await kv.set(key, userData);

  // Create indexed keys for each filterable field
  const indexedKeys: [string, string, string, string | number][] = [];
  
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(userData)) {
    if (key === "id") continue;
    if (typeof value === "string" || typeof value === "number" || typeof value === "boolean") {
      indexedKeys.push(["users", key, String(value), userId]);
    }
  }

  // Store indexed keys
  for (const indexedKey of indexedKeys) {
    await kv.set(indexedKey, true);
  }

  await kv.close();
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(userData), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

serve(handleRequest);
